features: 20,000 lb capacity - highest capacity Mohawk 2-post lift
Hydraulic fluid displacement synchronization - no chains, cables, or overhead obstructions
Direct drive system using no cables or chains
Automatic multi-position mechanical safety locks starting at 5 inches off the floor
Automatic swing arm restraints upon ascent
Clear and unobstructed floor access between posts
Adjustable height overhead steel hydraulic lines or in-floor routing
16 double-sealed self-lubricating ball bearing rollers (8 per carriage)
Wide base option with reduced concrete depth requirement (5.5 inches vs 6.5 inches)
safety_features: Automatic multi-position mechanical safety locks starting at 5 inches off the floor

16 double-sealed self-lubricating steel carriage bearings (8 per carriage)
notes: Specifications subject to change without notice
